user_prompt: kling 首尾帧(fflf) 重出装饰礼包展示视频：banner同图当首帧+尾帧→无缝循环。ref_types=首帧图像,尾帧图像；reference_images 传同一张 banner 两次（不要走 image_to_video 单帧模式）；model=kling, duration=5, aspect_ratio=auto。锁机位只加循环式氛围动，保住banner全部元素。

params.prompt: A short SEAMLESS LOOPING ambient clip of the same beach-resort scene. Keep ALL elements, layout, colors and identity from the source image UNCHANGED (the striped beach lounge chair, parasol, palms, shore) — DO NOT redraw, morph, move or restyle anything. ONLY add gentle cyclic ambient motion that returns exactly to the start: slow rolling sea waves, shimmering water light caustics, soft drifting sunlight god-rays, slowly rising bubbles, palm fronds swaying lightly, the parasol and striped fabric fluttering faintly. LOCKED static camera — absolutely NO camera push-in, zoom or pan (it would break the loop). Subtle, calm, premium beach-resort mood. The last frame must match the first frame for a perfect seamless loop. NO text, NO UI, NO new objects, NO people.
